heading: Officers: standards and qualifications for retention
label: 20403 Officers: standards and qualifications for retention

children.text: in any applicable yearly period, attain the number of points under that are prescribed by the Secretary of the Air Force; andsection 12732(a)(2) of this title
conform to such other standards and qualifications as the Secretary may prescribe for officers of the Space Force.

children.heading: .—Limitation on Minimum Number of Points
children.label: b .—Limitation on Minimum Number of Points
children.text: The Secretary may not prescribe a minimum of more than 50 points under subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Result of Failure to Comply
children.label: c .—Result of Failure to Comply
children.text: A Space Force officer who fails to attain the number of points prescribed under subsection (a)(1), or to conform to the standards and qualifications prescribed under subsection (a)(2), may be referred to a board convened under .section 20501(a) of this title
